data.name: BrowserLogsEmptyBrowserConfiguration
data.value: Tracked browser configuration resolved an empty browser value.

data.name: BrowserLogsEmptyProfileConfiguration
data.value: Tracked browser configuration resolved an empty profile value.

data.name: BrowserLogsProfileRequiresSharedUserDataMode
data.value: Tracked browser configuration set '{0}' to '{1}' while '{2}' is '{3}'. Profiles can only be selected when '{2}' is '{4}'.
data.comment: {0} is the profile configuration key, {1} is the configured profile value, {2} is the user data mode configuration key, {3} is the configured user data mode, {4} is the required user data mode

data.name: BrowserLogsInvalidUserDataModeConfiguration
data.value: Tracked browser configuration value '{0}' is not a valid '{1}'. Expected '{2}' or '{3}'.
data.comment: {0} is the configured user data mode value, {1} is the user data mode configuration key, {2} and {3} are valid user data mode values

data.name: BrowserLogsUnableToLocateBrowser
data.value: Unable to locate browser '{0}'. Specify an installed Chromium-based browser or an explicit executable path.
data.comment: {0} is the configured browser name or executable path

data.name: BrowserLogsAppHostPathShaNotAvailable
data.value: Cannot resolve the isolated browser user data directory because the AppHost path identifier is not available. Use '{0}' user data mode or run from a configured AppHost.
data.comment: {0} is the user data mode that does not require an AppHost path identifier

data.name: BrowserLogsUserDataDirectoryNotFound
data.value: Browser user data directory '{0}' was not found.
data.comment: {0} is the browser user data directory path

data.name: BrowserLogsTrackedBrowserProfileConflict
data.value: A tracked browser is already running for user data directory '{0}' with profile '{1}'. The requested profile is '{2}'. Close the existing tracked browser session or use isolated user data mode.
data.comment: {0} is the browser user data directory path, {1} is the profile used by the running browser, {2} is the requested profile

data.name: BrowserLogsUnableToReadProfileMetadata
data.value: Unable to read Chromium profile metadata from '{0}' while resolving browser profile '{1}'.
data.comment: {0} is the Chromium Local State file path, {1} is the requested browser profile

data.name: BrowserLogsInvalidProfileMetadata
data.value: Chromium profile metadata in '{0}' is invalid while resolving browser profile '{1}'.
data.comment: {0} is the Chromium Local State file path, {1} is the requested browser profile

data.name: BrowserLogsProfileNotFound
data.value: Browser profile '{0}' was not found under '{1}'. Specify the profile directory name (for example 'Default' or 'Profile 1') or a browser profile name from Chromium's profile metadata.
data.comment: {0} is the requested browser profile, {1} is the browser user data directory path

data.name: BrowserLogsAmbiguousProfile
data.value: Browser profile '{0}' matched multiple Chromium profiles under '{1}'. Specify the profile directory name instead.
data.comment: {0} is the requested browser profile, {1} is the browser user data directory path

data.name: BrowserLogsResourceMissingHttpEndpoint
data.value: Resource '{0}' does not have an HTTP or HTTPS endpoint. Browser logs require an endpoint to navigate to.

data.name: BrowserLogsEndpointNotAllocated
data.value: Endpoint '{0}' for resource '{1}' has not been allocated yet.
data.comment: {0} is the endpoint name, {1} is the Aspire resource name
